content: Piper: Sheffield, it's been a while. How have you been holding up? Sheffield: Piper! Oh, I'm doing alright, thanks for asking. It's been a long time since someone's shown me a kind word. You know, I used to enjoy a good drink at the Dugout Inn, but I can't anymore. My liver's a mess. Piper: I'm sorry to hear that, Sheffield. Do you need anything? Maybe I can help you find a way to manage your condition. Sheffield: Yeah, a bottle of Nuka-Cola would do wonders. I'm so thirsty for it. I can't even remember the last time I had one. Piper: Well, I happen to have some connections. How about I get you that Nuka-Cola? Sheffield: You would do that for me?

Piper: Absolutely, Sheffield. I'd be happy to help. Just let me know when you need it. And if there's anything else I can do for you, please don't hesitate to ask. Sheffield: Thank you, Piper. That means a lot to me. Just let me know when you've got that Nuka-Cola for me, and I'll be looking forward to it. Piper: Not a problem, Sheffield. Consider it done. In the meantime, take care and try to stay strong. Sheffield: I'll do my best. Thanks again. Piper: You're welcome, Sheffield. Anytime.
